brand.name: Foxy Exam
brand.loginTagline: A secure online exam platform with AI-powered proctoring technology.

config.requireAppDesc: Requires desktop app, web browser not supported
config.requireCameraDesc: Continuous video recording and gesture analysis
config.monitorGazeDesc: AI warns when looking away too long
config.requireFaceAuthDesc: AI matches face with profile picture
config.requireDualCameraDesc: Requires laptop webcam + phone camera at an angle
config.lockDeviceDesc: Prevents device switching during exam session

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the exam system

sidebar.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?

dashboard.inProgressAlert: You have an exam in progress

examDetail.startConfirmDesc: You are about to start "{{name}}". Duration: {{duration}} min. Are you sure?
examDetail.resumeConfirmDesc: You will resume your previous attempt.
examDetail.ruleRequireApp: Must use the Foxy Exam desktop app.
examDetail.ruleBrowserOk: Can be taken on browser or app.
examDetail.ruleCamera: Webcam will stay on for automatic proctoring.
examDetail.ruleBannedApps: The system will monitor for banned applications running on your device.
examDetail.ruleBannedObjects: The system may detect prohibited objects via camera (per exam config / Object Service).
examDetail.ruleNoSplit: No split screen allowed (exclusive mode). Keyboard shortcuts disabled.
examDetail.ruleAutoSubmit: The exam will auto-submit when time runs out.

settings.faceDesc: Manage registered face for exam authentication

disconnected.title: Lost connection to server
disconnected.descOnline: Network is back, attempting to restore session.
disconnected.descOfflineMode: Cannot connect. The system will retry automatically, or you can enter offline mode.
disconnected.descOffline: Cannot connect. The system will retry automatically.
disconnected.retryFailed: Auto retry failed 3 times. Please try manually.

precheck.configSubtitle: Please read each item before continuing.
precheck.deviceAccessError: Cannot access devices. Check camera/mic permissions.
precheck.liveKitConnectError: Cannot connect to LiveKit. Please try again.
precheck.qrGenerateError: Cannot generate QR code. Try again.
precheck.phoneStreamEmptyError: No video stream received from phone.
precheck.phoneStreamReceiveError: Error receiving video stream from phone.
precheck.phoneCameraDesc: Phone will replace laptop webcam. Both devices must be on the same WiFi.
precheck.scanQrDesc: Scan QR code with your phone camera
precheck.appRequiredError: This exam requires the Desktop App. Please open it using Foxy Exam App.
precheck.osNotSupportedError: Unsupported OS ({{platform}}). Windows 10+, macOS, or Linux X11 is required.
precheck.configLoadError: Cannot load configuration. Please try again.
precheck.screenSharePermissionError: Screen sharing permission is required to enter the exam.
precheck.multiScreenDetected: Detected {{count}} screens. Please disconnect secondary monitors!
precheck.downloadingModel: Downloading face detection model (~10MB). Runs only once.
precheck.keepStill: Keep still, look directly into the camera for 3 seconds.
precheck.faceInFrameDesc: Keep face in frame. The screen will flash colors to check if the camera is real.
precheck.keepStillFlashDesc: Keep still, do not move. The camera is reflecting colors.

exam.question: Question {{n}}
exam.confirmSubmitUnanswered: You still have {{n}} unanswered question(s). Submit anyway?
exam.confirmSubmit: Are you sure you want to submit?
exam.wsDisconnectBlur: Network or monitoring server disconnected. Reconnecting...
exam.violationProhibitedObject: Prohibited object detected in camera frame.
exam.liveKitConnectError: Cannot connect to LiveKit monitoring. Please try entering the exam again.
exam.examSuspendedReason: The proctor has forced your exam to stop.
exam.faceAuthLockedWrongFace: Face mismatch! The exam is locked until your identity is reverified.
exam.faceAuthLockedFailed: Face verification failed. Please sit in the correct camera position.
exam.examSuspendedByProctor: The exam has been suspended by the proctor.
exam.historyBlocked: Browser back is disabled during the exam.

proctoring.requireApp: Exam must be taken in Foxy Exam (Electron)
proctoring.requireCamera: Camera must stay on for the whole exam
proctoring.lockDevice: Device lock — same machine for the whole attempt
proctoring.levelDesc: Overall exam proctoring level (None, Standard, Strict).
proctoring.requireAppDesc: Forces exam to be taken in the desktop application rather than the web browser to prevent software cheating.
proctoring.requireCameraDesc: The system will record and analyze behavior via webcam throughout the exam.
proctoring.requireScreenDesc: Your entire computer screen will be shared and recorded for proctor monitoring.
proctoring.noMultiMonitorDesc: Using more than 1 monitor is forbidden. Disconnect secondary monitors to take the exam.
proctoring.monitorGazeDesc: AI tracks gaze to warn if you look away from the exam space for too long.
proctoring.requireMicDesc: Records room audio for AI speech detection and helps proctors identify unusual noises.
proctoring.requireFaceAuthDesc: Uses AI to match your actual face with your registered profile photo before entry.
proctoring.detectBannedAppsDesc: The system continuously scans and prevents running restricted applications (Discord, TeamViewer, Zalo, etc.).
proctoring.detectBannedObjectsDesc: AI analyzes camera feed to detect prohibited objects like Smartphones, Headphones, etc.
proctoring.lockDeviceDesc: Locks the exam attempt to a specific browser/device. Prevents device swapping mid-session.
proctoring.streamCameraDesc: Video transmission quality for AI Camera stream from device to Server.
proctoring.streamScreenDesc: Video transmission quality for Screen Sharing stream to Server.

mobileCameraSetup.title: Phone Camera Setup
mobileCameraSetup.guide: Place your phone at eye level (90°), so the frame shows your laptop on one side and you on the other.
mobileCameraSetup.angleGuideDesc: Place the phone at eye level so the laptop is on one side and you are on the other
mobileCameraSetup.viewGuideTitle: Laptop on one side, you on the other
mobileCameraSetup.viewGuideDesc: The phone camera frame must show the laptop on one side and you on the opposite side
mobileCameraSetup.wifiGuideDesc: Phone and laptop must be on the same network to connect
mobileCameraSetup.scanQrSubtitle: Open your phone camera and scan the QR code below to connect as a secondary camera.
mobileCameraSetup.connectFailedDesc: The phone could not connect. Ensure both devices are on the same WiFi network.

mobileLiveness.title: Verify Secondary Camera
mobileLiveness.subtitle: Ensure the phone camera is positioned correctly: laptop on one side, you on the other, then smile.
mobileLiveness.positionPhone: Place the phone at eye level: laptop on one side, you on the other. Face the phone camera.
mobileLiveness.nowSmile: Great! Now smile to verify your face.
mobileLiveness.moveToSide: Move to the left or right — laptop should be on the other side.
mobileLiveness.tooFar: Camera is too far, move closer.
mobileLiveness.tooClose: Camera is too close, move back.
mobileLiveness.noFace: No face detected on secondary camera.
mobileLiveness.pleaseSmile: Please smile at the phone camera.

spotCheck.title: Secondary Camera Check
spotCheck.subtitle: Look at your phone camera now!
spotCheck.instructions: Turn your face toward the phone camera so the system can verify your identity. You have 10 seconds.
spotCheck.done: I looked at the phone camera
spotCheck.failedDesc: A minor violation has been recorded. Be ready for the next check.
